textEn: When the Inevitable Event comes to pass,
there will be none to deny its occurrence;
it will bring some low and raise others up.
When the earth is shaken violently,
and the mountains crushed to pieces,
and turn to scattered dust,
then you are sorted into three groups:
the people of the right – how blessed will be the people of the right!
textTranslit: Fa as haabul maimanati maaa as haabul maimanah

textEn: The people of the left – how miserable will be the people of the left!
textTranslit: Wa as haabul mash'amati maaa as haabul mash'amah

textEn: And the forerunners [in faith] are the forerunners [in Paradise].
They are the nearest ones [to Allah],
in Gardens of Bliss,
many from the early generations,
and a few from the later generations.
[They will be seated] on jeweled couches,
reclining on them, facing one another.
They will be served by immortal youths
with cups, pitchers, and glasses [of wine] from a flowing spring,
textTranslit: Bi akwaabinw wa abaareeq, wa kaasim mim ma'een

textEn: which will neither cause any headache nor intoxication,
along with fruits of their choice,
and flesh of birds that they may desire.
And [they will have] maidens with wide gorgeous eyes,
like pristine pearls,
as a reward for what they used to do.

textAr: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا
textEn: They will not hear therein any idle talk or sinful speech,
textTranslit: Laa yasma'oona feehaa laghwanw wa laa taaseemaa

textEn: except the words of peace, peace.
The people of the right – how blessed will be the people of the right!
textTranslit: Wa as haabul yameeni maaa as haabul Yameen

textEn: [They will be] in the midst of thornless lote trees,
and clusters of bananas,
and extended shade,
and flowing water,
and abundant fruit –
neither ceasing nor restricted –
and elevated mattresses [on beds].
Indeed, We have perfectly created them [i.e., their spouses],
and have made them virgins,
loving and of equal age,
for the people of the right,
many from the earlier generations,
and many from the later generations.
And the people of the left – how wretched will be the people of the left!
textTranslit: Wa as haabush shimaali maaa as haabush shimaal

textEn: [They will be] in scorching wind and scalding water,
in the shade of black smoke,
neither cool nor refreshing.
Indeed, they used to be in luxuries before,
and persisted in the gravest sin.

textAr: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
textEn: They used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, will we really be raised again?
textTranslit: Wa kaanoo yaqooloona a'izaa mitnaa wa kunnaa turaabanw wa izaaman'ainnaa lamab'oosoon

textEn: And our forefathers as well?”
Say, [O Prophet], “Indeed, the former and later generations
will be gathered on a predetermined Day.
Then you, O misguided deniers,
will surely eat from the tree of zaqqūm,
textTranslit: La aakiloona min shaja rim min zaqqoom

textEn: filling your bellies with it,
and drinking scalding water on top of it,
drinking like thirsty camels do.”
This will be their welcome on the Day of Judgment.
It is We Who created you; why do you not then believe [in resurrection]?
Have you thought about the semen that you emit?
Is it you who create it, or is it We Who are the Creators?

textAr: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
textEn: We have ordained death among you, and nothing can overcome us
textTranslit: Nahnu qaddarnaa baina kumul mawta wa maa nahnu bimasbooqeen

textAr: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثَـٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
textEn: from transforming you and recreating you in forms that you do not know.
textTranslit: 'Alaaa an nubaddila amsaalakum wa nunshi'akum fee maa laa ta'lamoon

textAr: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
textEn: You are well aware of the first creation; why do you not then take heed?
textTranslit: Wa laqad 'alimtumun nash atal oolaa falaw laa tazakkaroon

textEn: Have you thought about what you sow?
Is it you who cause it to grow, or is it We Who make it grow?

textAr: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ حُطَـٰمًا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ
textEn: If We willed, We could reduce your harvest to rubble, leaving you to wonder and lament,
textTranslit: Law nashaaa'u laja'al naahu hutaaman fazaltum tafakkahoon

textEn: “We suffered loss,
rather, we are deprived.”
Have you thought about the water that you drink?

textAr: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ
textEn: Is it you who bring it down from the clouds, or is it We Who bring it down?
textTranslit: 'A-antum anzaltumoohu minal muzni am nahnul munziloon

textAr: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنَـٰهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ
textEn: If We willed, We could make it salty; will you not then give thanks?
textTranslit: Law nashaaa'u ja'alnaahu ujaajan falaw laa tashkuroon

textEn: Have you thought about the fire that you kindle?

textAr: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ
textEn: Is it you who produced its trees, or is it We Who produced it?
We made it a reminder [of the Hellfire] and a benefit for the travelers.
textTranslit: Nahnu ja'alnaahaa tazkira tanw wa mataa'al lilmuqween

textEn: So glorify the Name of your Lord, the Most Great.
I do swear by the positions of the stars –
and this is indeed a great oath, if only you knew –
that this is indeed a noble Qur’an,
in a well-preserved Record,
that none can touch except the purified ones –
a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.
Do you take this discourse lightly,
and instead [of thanking Allah] for the provision you are given, you show ingratitude?
Then why [are you helpless] when the soul reaches the throat,
while you are looking on,

textAr: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَـٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ
textEn: when We are closer to him than you, but you do not see?
textTranslit: Wa nahnu aqrabu ilaihi minkum wa laakil laa tubsiroon

textEn: If you are not subject to retribution, then why do you not
textTranslit: Falaw laaa in kuntum ghira madeeneen

textEn: bring that [soul] back, if you are truthful?
If that dying person is one of those who will be brought near to Allah,
textTranslit: Fa ammaaa in kaana minal muqarrabeen

textEn: then [he will have] comfort, fragrance, and a Garden of Bliss.
textTranslit: Farawhunw wa raihaa nunw wa jannatu na'eem

textAr: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
textEn: If he is one of the people of the right,
textTranslit: Wa ammaaa in kaana min as haabil yameen

textEn: [He will be told], “Peace be to you, for being one of the people of the right.”
textTranslit: Fasalaamul laka min as haabil yameen

textAr: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
textEn: But if he is one of the misguided deniers,
textTranslit: Wa ammaaa in kaana minal mukazzibeenad daaalleen

textEn: then he will be welcomed with scalding water,
and he will burn in Blazing Fire.
This is indeed the absolute truth.
So glorify the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
